title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.1025 - Request for rules for suspension or sanctioning of law license, when
text:
454.1025.  Request for rules for suspension or sanctioning of law license, when. — By July 1, 1998, the supreme court is requested to have in effect a rule in accordance with 42 U.S.C. section 666(a)(16) which shall permit the suspension or other sanctioning of a law license for any person who owes an arrearage in an amount equal to or greater than three months of support payments or two thousand five hundred dollars, whichever first occurs.
(L. 1997 S.B. 361) 
Effective 7-01-97
